routes.goal: Contact list renders inside the app shell. Search input is focusable and filters the list by name. Clicking a row navigates to the contact's detail page without errors.
Ada Lovelace's detail card shows her name, emails, phones, and notes. Back button returns to /contacts.
Unknown id shows the 'Contact not found' card with a working back button. No console errors.
Profile form renders with current values populated. Toggling the public/private slider updates the status chip in the same view. Save button is disabled until the form becomes dirty.

flows.goal:
Starting on /profile, ensure the visibility toggle is currently in the Private state.
Click the toggle. Verify the status chip now reads 'Profile is Public'.
Click Save changes. Verify a confirmation snackbar appears.
Reload /profile and verify the toggle remains in the Public state.
